As a Senior Data Scientist and Machine Learning Engineer at Lowe's Companies, I contribute to the development and implementation of advanced machine learning and natural language processing (NLP) solutions and large language models. Currently completing a Master's degree in Computer Science at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, I bring a strong academic foundation and a track record of innovation in machine learning and data science. My goal is to apply my expertise in programming, NLP, LLM, and advanced analytics to solve complex challenges and deliver value in dynamic environments.

Last year, I took a risk and joined a startup for the first time in my career. At the startup, I had the opportunity to work more with building generative AI agents, instead of my usual work of creating machine learning models and pipelines. After working on developing a more robust system of langgraph-based agents, and adding best practices learned in the past decade as prompt context, I created AI agents that could write and execute Python code to generate robust data science models to support various businesses.

results.title: Neomi Sony
highlights:
AI Engineer@Lowes| Ex Microsoft Intern| Winner Infosys SOI &Technovation Challenge @Goldman Sachs| GRM Project @IBM
...
AI Engineer at [Lowe's Companies, Inc.](https://www.linkedin.com/company/lowe%27s-home-improvement)
...
As an AI engineer at Lowe’s I build solutions utilizing GenAI and LLMs. I have 3+ years of work experience in Software Development and Artificial Intelligence. I graduated from Cochin University of Science and Technology with Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science. I started my journey in technology in 9th std when I got to participate in the Global Technovation Challenge where we worked for 3 months at Goldman Sachs and developed a mobile app to help autistic kids and was awarded 2nd at National Level (India). This experience helped me immensely in developing my interest in technology and hence participated in various workshops/sessions thereafter and became really fond of coding in Java and C++. During my under-graduation I won the Global Infosys Summer of Ideas under the theme Industry 4.0 and completed an internship at Microsoft as Associate Consultant under the domain Azure Cloud and AI. I also did various other projects/hackathons at IBM, JPnMe and so on. I have a special interest in Machine Learning, Cloud and IoT. I love using Technology in real life situations/problems and improve the lives of people. I am an active member in ‘Lean in Tech’ women community circle and team member in DSC CUSAT of my college. The leadership roles I have held are Lead for Technovation challenge and House Captain in school. As far as my personal interests are concerned, I love to meet new people, take initiative and seek out new challenges. I have a strong passion to learn and grasp new unknown areas and master them. I’m keenly interested in merging my technical skills with business acumen. I am actively seeking internships in the field of Software Development/ Machine Learning/Cloud. My other talents are public speaking, sports, dramatics, dance and art. I was awarded Best All Rounder and Best Star Student in my school. I enjoy cooking, travelling, watching movies and hanging out with friends and family.
...
#### AI Engineer (Current)
...
#### Associate AI Engineer
...
Machine Learning Platform Developed, evaluated, and productionized Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions using Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance IT service desk and Lowe’s website use cases, leveraging cutting-edge Generative AI technologies. Demonstrated expertise in prompt engineering, integration of vector databases such as Pinecone and Milvus, and implementation of rerankers for improved retrieval performance. Deployed models using the vLLM server and built efficient data ingestion pipelines Boosted retrieval accuracy from 67% to 93% by incorporating hybrid search methods and advanced techniques. Collaborated with the Nvidia team to integrate their Nemo Guardrails service into our applications for enhanced model safety and robustness. Led upgrades to MLflow (both backend and frontend) and contributed to adding new functionalities in Kubeflow and supported other MLOps tasks.

Data, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Artificial Intelligence are few among the most trending topics in the world. With these words stuck in my brain like an earworm, thus began my journey with the most fundamental questions why? How? I dug deep into my mind and internet to see how data has evolved over time to become a center of this digital world. As humans evolved, each generation has passed on their customs, traditions, emotions, inventions and their learnings in life to the next. This data can be seen in many forms and mediums around the world. Stone Age humans used cave paintings and the oldest scriptures were transferred orally to the next generations before manuscripts were written on birch bark or palm leaves. Paper was then used to store and pass information. With the advent of the digital era, we use processed metal to store data. An exponential increase in technological advancements resulted in generating 2.5 quintillion bytes of data a day. Processing, storing and understanding this data has become indispensable to grow our knowledge. I'd love to know other's perspective too, feel free to drop in a message.

As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related technical field. A Master's degree is strongly preferred and will be given special consideration.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

results.title: Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote) | Jobflarely
highlights:
Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote) | Jobflarely
...
# Generative Artificial Intelligence Architect (Remote)
...
- AI System Architecture: Design and develop the architecture and infrastructure for AI systems, including data storage, processing, and retrieval mechanisms. Ensure scalability, flexibility, and efficiency of the system to handle large volumes of data and complex algorithms.
...
- Algorithm Development: Develop and implement advanced AI algorithms and models, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks. Continuously evaluate and improve algorithms to enhance system performance and accuracy.
...
- Data Integration: Identify relevant data sources and design methods for data collection, integration, cleansing, and transformation. Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to ensure quality and relevance of data for AI model training.
...
- Model Training and Evaluation: Train AI models using supervised, unsupervised, or reinforcement learning techniques. Implement evaluation methodologies to measure the performance and effectiveness of trained models. Fine-tune models based on feedback and data insights.
...
- Neural Network Design: Design and optimize deep learning neural networks for various AI tasks, such as natural language processing, computer vision, recommendation systems, and predictive analytics. Implement innovative architectures and techniques to improve model accuracy and efficiency.
...
- System Integration: Collaborate with software developers and engineers to integrate AI systems into existing platforms or applications. Ensure seamless communication and compatibility between AI components and other software modules.
...
Ethical and Responsible AI
...
fairness, transparency,
...
Address biases and potential
...
- Research and Innovation: Stay updated with the latest advancements in AI technologies, frameworks, and algorithms. Conduct research and experimentation to explore new approaches and techniques that can enhance AI capabilities.
...
- Collaboration and Communication: Collaborate with multi-functional teams, including data scientists, software engineers, and business partners, to define AI requirements and deliver AI solutions that meet business objectives. Communicate complex AI concepts and solutions effectively to both technical and non-technical team members.
...
- Qualifications:
...
- A Bachelor's or equivalent experience or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or related field.
- Proven experience in designing and developing AI systems, including machine learning, deep learning, and neural networks.
...
- Strong programming skills in languages such as Python, R, or Java. Familiarity with AI libraries, frameworks, and tools such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Keras.
...
- Solid understanding of cloud computing platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and experience deploying AI models on these platforms.
...
- Comprehension of AI concepts, algorithms, and methodologies.
...
- Knowledge of designing large scale AI solutions, data integration, cleansing, and transformation techniques.
...
- Familiarity with BigData platforms and technologies, such as Hadoop or Spark.
...
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to think creatively and provide innovative solutions.
...
- Strong communication and collaboration skills to work effectively in multidisciplinary teams.
...
- Knowledge of ethical AI practices and regulations is a plus.
...
The annual salary for this position is between $225K-$325K depending on experience and other qualifications of the successful candidate.
